entries.definition: The Round Table represents Camelot's elite leadership circle and its competing obligations.
entries.why_it_matters: Court unity matters because policies can fail politically even when they look practical.

entries.definition: Granary relief means opening stored food to protect households during scarcity.
entries.why_it_matters: It can calm hunger quickly, but it may anger elites who fear reserve loss.

entries.definition: Guild labor is skilled work available for hauling, repair, and production support.
entries.why_it_matters: If labor weakens, roads, mills, and relief all become less reliable.

background_notes: This pack binds canonical systems to Camelot's court, granary, and winter-road language without changing the simulation ontology.
